name: Next Level Golf
address: 7910 S 3500 E A-150, Cottonwood Heights, UT 84121
about: Next Level Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Cottonwood Heights, UT, offering a luxury country club environment with state-of-the-art technology. The venue features Golfzon Two Vision simulators equipped with high-speed camera sensors, providing a realistic golfing experience on world-renowned courses. Membership is the primary access model, with tiered options including month-to-month, 6-month, and annual passes that offer varying levels of benefits such as 24-hour access, unlimited tee times, and guest privileges.
why_golfers_like_it: AI swing analysis app for instant performance feedback
Luxury country club atmosphere with elegant finishes and private bays
Golfzon Two Vision simulators with 200fps camera accuracy
Full-service bar and lounge areas for socializing

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen available for food service; no food allowed inside simulators
Full-service bar available for members and guests

simulator_hardware.notes: Four high-speed camera sensors, 200fps capture, touchscreen kiosk

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members and guests must bring their own clubs; club rentals are not mentioned as available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed inside the simulators, but a full-service bar and kitchen are available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Exact time for 18 holes is not specified, but the venue offers unlimited tee times with membership access.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Next Level Golf has a minimum age requirement of 18 for membership, making it unsuitable for children.
